metadata.title: Digital Accounts | Bank Accounts | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Meezan Bank now offers Pak Rupee based personal banking accounts via Meezan Digital Account Opening App to all Resident Pakistanis.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Meezan Digital Onboarding Solutions Bank Accounts that are opened instantly! Meezan Bank now offers Pak Rupee based personal banking accounts via Meezan Digital Account Opening App to all Resident Pakistanis. You can open a Meezan Bank Account straight from our Account Opening App – it's simple, safe and secure. All you need is: A smart phone Download Account Opening App A mobile SIM that is in your name Source of income for Meezan Digital Account *Original ID document such as CNIC * For unemployed individuals and housewives, beneficial owner ID and details shall also be required. Digital Accounts that are Safe and Secure You can open different types of digital accounts with us in the local currency Digital Student Account Learn More Digital Asaan Learn More Digital Remittance Learn More Digital Freelancer Account Learn More Meezan Bachat Account Learn More Rupee Current Learn More Rupee Savings Learn More Meezan Digital Account Tutorial Video Features and Benefits Free Meezan Internet Banking – Instantly register to use our powerful Internet Banking Facility to make transfers, bill payments and much more! Free Meezan Mobile Banking App - Manage your account with the Meezan Mobile Banking App. Your account is in your control – free to manage your income, spending and savings however it suits you. Debit Card at your door step – Just choose the type of card and request to have it delivered at your doorstep. Pay Merchants seamlessly - Forget PIN codes and card swipes. Pay your merchants directly with your mobile phone in a few taps. Terms & Conditions FAQs Guidelines MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today?
